name: Finnish Pulla (Coffee Bread)
recipeInstructions:
This is a very high rising bread. For best results, make no more than the 1.5 lb recipe. If you see the bread rising toward the viewing window, pierce it with a skewer to allow air to escape.
Preheat your oven (ABM) as required.
In a bowl, mix together the milk, vanilla, eggs, butter, sugar, salt, and Cardamon.
Gradually add the dry ingredients (bread flour and yeast) until combined.
Pour the batter into a greased baking dish and place it in the preheated oven.
Glaze: In another bowl, whisk together 1/4 cup sugar and 1 beaten egg. Brush this glaze over the risen bread.
Sprinkle additional sugar, poppy seeds, chopped almonds, or sliced almonds on top of the bread before baking. If using an ABM, ensure the glaze does not spill onto the machine itself during baking.
